products.name: Heart to Voice
products.detail: “Heart to Voice” is an AI model that evaluates heart failure severity by analyzing voice data and clinical indicators, supporting patient care from high-risk screening to post-discharge management. a.cure is developing a prescription-based voice monitoring solution for discharged heart failure patients. Through once-daily voice monitoring, the system analyzes condition changes and detects early signs of deterioration, enabling timely intervention and helping prevent hospital readmission. The AI model provides a four-level severity classification based on voice recordings of about 10 seconds, with a target performance of AUC 95%. Using a non-invasive voice analysis approach, the solution allows convenient use in everyday environments and continuous monitoring after discharge. A web-based dashboard and notification system enable healthcare providers and caregivers to monitor patient status and provide lifestyle guidance based on severity levels.

products.name: ABC Platform Service to Discover Antibody Treatments Using AI
products.detail:
The ABC Platform is an integrated AI-driven drug discovery service that combines artificial intelligence (AI) with computer-aided drug design (CADD) technologies to support the entire process of antibody therapeutic development, from candidate discovery to structural prediction, binding affinity analysis, and drug property evaluation.

Traditional antibody discovery processes require significant time and cost for candidate screening and experimental validation. The ABC Platform accelerates this process by leveraging advanced AI models and large-scale biological data analysis to identify promising antibody candidates and optimize their design at an early stage.

The platform provides a range of AI-powered analytical functions within a single environment, including paratope prediction, antigen–antibody binding affinity prediction, protein structure prediction, immunogenicity and developability assessment, and docking-based binding interaction analysis. These capabilities allow researchers to evaluate potential candidates before conducting costly laboratory experiments, significantly improving research efficiency and reducing trial-and-error in the drug development pipeline.

Delivered as a cloud-based service, the ABC Platform can be easily accessed by pharmaceutical companies, biotech startups, research institutes, and academic laboratories without the need for dedicated infrastructure. While primarily designed for antibody therapeutics discovery, the platform can also be extended to broader protein-based drug research.

By enabling data-driven decision-making and AI-powered analysis, the ABC Platform helps shorten drug discovery timelines, reduce R&D costs, and enhance the success probability of next-generation biologics development.

products.name: AllCOM Smart Tumbler
products.detail:
Product Features:
A portable cooling and heating device that integrates target temperature reaching, maintenance, and hygiene into a single product. Unlike conventional products focused on simple heat retention, its core function is to reach and maintain the desired temperature.

Unlike conventional heating-oriented products, it adopts a target temperature control structure with cooling functionality, enabling precise temperature management based on user-defined settings.

It is developed with a detachable water container, SUS-316, and sensor-based protection logic, with hygiene and safe use in portable environments as key design considerations.

It is designed to collect usage logs, including set temperature, control history, reaching time, and maintenance deviation, and to connect them to personalized recommendations and automatic tuning.

It incorporates app-connected control and monitoring functions to enhance user convenience and support data-driven product advancement.


Product Strengths:
It can address temperature management needs across portable usage environments, including parenting, outings, outdoor activities, exercise, and vehicle use, with a single device, offering high versatility and usability.

By integrating temperature reaching, maintenance, hygiene, and safety into one product, it reduces the inconvenience of using multiple products and efficiently addresses temperature management needs in various usage situations.

It resolves the cooling gap that conventional heating-oriented products fail to address through target temperature control with cooling functionality, thereby reducing temperature failure costs during movement.

By linking usage logs with KPIs, quantifying performance failure patterns, and continuously operating a data learning-based improvement loop, it secures a structure that can improve both recommendation accuracy and control stability.

It integrates thermal management, power control, sensor control, and hygiene separation modules and verifies them using quantitative criteria such as reaching time, maintenance deviation, and initial defect rate, thereby securing stable commercialization competitiveness even in portable environments.

It redefines the market not as a simple tumbler but as a portable thermal management device that reduces temperature failure costs on the move, enabling differentiated market positioning from existing products.

The product’s technological excellence and IP competitiveness have been externally validated through the 2025 FIX Innovation Award, recognition as a CES 2026 Innovation Award Honoree, and a portfolio of intellectual property rights, including 3 registered patents, 1 patent application, 6 trademark applications, and 1 design application and 1 design registration.

Its marketability and commercialization potential have also been confirmed through post-CES business performance, including 120 overseas buyer follow-up leads, 7 online meetings, 19 sample requests, and 1 executed MOU.

products.name: Amfibian (Semiconductor Manufacturing Process Control Platform)

Amfibian™ is an on-premise AI process control platform that predicts process conditions and derives optimal recipe and control parameters based on semiconductor mass-production data.

Its key differentiator is that process engineers—without relying on developers or data scientists—can directly create, modify, validate, and deploy models. An intuitive model-building framework combined with a digital twin–based pre-validation system enables scenario testing and risk assessment before deployment. In operation, the platform provides stabilization features including monitoring and rollback.

By integrating equipment, metrology, and historical data, Amfibian performs virtual metrology (VM) and control optimization, delivering not only diagnostics but also concrete adjustment guidance. Designed as an add-on to existing MES and APC environments, it allows rapid deployment and is scalable from CMP to a wide range of semiconductor processes.

products.detail:
ㅇ Technology Overview) ASTRO 3D is a solution that delivers immersive sound in real time without being constrained by specific formats, platforms, or devices

   - Manufacturers can upgrade sound performance without changing device design, enabling a more cost-efficient approach

□ Strength 2) Lightweight architecture with strong performance

ㅇ Our SDK operates at 41 MIPS, approximately 50% lighter than competing solutions

   - Immersive sound can be implemented not only in premium devices with high-performance chipsets, but also in affordable entry-level products

□ Strength 3) Device-specific optimization capability

ㅇ Rather than applying the same immersive sound technology uniformly across all products, we optimize performance based on a detailed analysis of each device

   - The solution can be embedded within the limited SoC resources available in each device

   - Sound engineers with decades of experience directly measure and tune speaker structure and frequency response for each device to maximize the immersive sound effect

products.name: ENSEMBLE (On-device software-based multi-device output and automatic frequency range allocation solution for TVs and external speakers)
products.detail:
ㅇ Technology Overview) ENSEMBLE is a solution that supports simultaneous audio output from TVs and Bluetooth speakers, including soundbars, while automatically assigning the appropriate frequency range to each device

□ Strength 1) Differentiated acoustic design through frequency band separation
ㅇ Competing solutions typically expand channels by duplicating the same audio signal across multiple speakers
	•	This approach can cause phase interference or sound smearing as identical signals overlap, which may lead to sound distortion
	•	Our technology expands channels while separating frequency bands, assigning low frequencies to external speakers and high frequencies to TV speakers
	•	Conventional crossover-based band splitting can degrade sound quality, but our solution implements the principles of bi-amping and bi-wiring in software
	•	As a result, ordinary speakers can be upgraded to perform like high-spec 2-way speakers through a firmware update alone, without any hardware replacement
□ Strength 2) Open compatibility
ㅇ Competing solutions are typically built on closed ecosystems that require a TV and soundbar from the same brand to operate together
	•	Our technology enables interoperability even when the TV and external speakers come from different manufacturers
	•	This open structure avoids forcing consumers into a specific brand ecosystem and provides a strong point of appeal by expanding user choice
□ Strength 3) Ultra-precise synchronization
ㅇ When devices from different manufacturers are connected, differences in chipset specifications often make output timing mismatches unavoidable
	•	Our latency correction system precisely resolves synchronization issues between TV internal speakers and external speakers
	•	This enables a stable and immersive sound experience without audible delay, regardless of the device combination
□ Strength 4) Manufacturing cost competitiveness through open compatibility
ㅇ With its high versatility and broad device compatibility, our technology gives manufacturers greater freedom in selecting external speaker partners without being tied to a specific brand or specification
	•	This increases bargaining power in supplier negotiations and helps reduce hardware sourcing costs
	•	As a result, it directly contributes to lower manufacturing costs
	•	It also provides a strategic advantage by allowing flexible product lineup planning from entry-level to premium models

products.name: LUMINA (On-device software-based TV and lighting synchronization solution)
products.detail:
ㅇ Technology Overview)  LUMINA is a solution that synchronizes lighting with color information from on-screen video, visually extending the viewing area onto the surrounding wall and maximizing immersion

By using object recognition and tracking, the solution can reflect not only background colors but also the colors of key objects in the video through the lighting

This creates clear differentiation from products that rely only on average color extraction for lighting synchronization

□ Strength 1) Precise color mapping based on video object recognition and tracking

ㅇ Competing products typically extract average color values from the screen border or nearby areas and project them onto the lighting

This approach has limitations in complex scenes, dark backgrounds, rapid scene changes, and accurate reflection of key object colors

Our proprietary video object recognition and tracking technology overcomes these limitations

It can reflect a wide range of object colors in the lighting without being constrained by screen position, creating a vivid sense of immersion as if the TV image were expanding across the entire wall

□ Strength 2) Independent and open ecosystem

ㅇ Competing products are typically built on a closed ecosystem that requires an expensive dedicated sync box together with proprietary lighting products

This creates a significant additional cost burden for consumers who want to build the full setup

It also limits scalability in large B2B business models involving TV manufacturers and strip LED suppliers

Our solution is not tied to any specific lighting brand

TV manufacturers can select the most suitable strip LED partners based on supply chain conditions and cost strategy

It also provides a structure in which manufacturers can capture hardware revenue directly, enabling a more manufacturer-friendly business ecosystem

□ Strength 3) Lower manufacturer cost and higher value creation

ㅇ Our solution is implemented as software on the SoC, allowing it to operate on the TV alone without external devices such as a sync box

Manufacturers can deliver high-performance ambient lighting on existing TV products without incurring sync box-related costs

Consumers can create an ambient lighting setup more easily and at a much lower cost than conventional alternatives

	•	By reproducing both horizontal and vertical motion in real time, the solution delivers more vivid immersion even in complex scenes such as action sequences and multi-person conversations

products.name: Clickless(DTx)
products.detail:
World's first digital therapeutic for Tempromandibular Disorders
Clickless DTx is a prescription-based digital therapeutic (Software as a Medical Device) designed for patients with chronic and recurrent temporomandibular disorder (TMD). The solution integrates AI-based facial motion recognition technology with cognitive behavioral therapy (CBT)-based treatment protocols to deliver personalized rehabilitation tailored to each patient’s condition.

Conventional TMD treatment relies heavily on in-clinic physical therapy and medication, which limits continuous patient management and long-term adherence. Clickless DTx enables patients to perform therapeutic exercises in their daily environment, improving treatment adherence and promoting sustained symptom relief.

The system analyzes patients’ facial movement data in real time to assess exercise performance and accuracy, providing personalized feedback to maximize therapeutic outcomes. In addition, clinicians can monitor patient progress, adherence, and symptom changes through a dedicated dashboard, allowing data-driven treatment management.

Clickless DTx is the first digital therapeutic to conduct a randomized controlled trial (RCT) for TMD, demonstrating clinical efficacy. The results were published in an SCI-indexed journal (Journal of Dentistry). The product has also been designated as an Innovative Medical Device by the Korean Ministry of Food and Drug Safety and has received official regulatory approval as a medical device in Korea.

The product is being commercialized through a B2B2C model targeting dental clinics and hospitals, with plans to expand globally, including regulatory submissions to the U.S. FDA and other international markets.

products.name: Canopy Earned Wage Access (EWA)
products.detail:
Canopy is a financial wellness platform that enables employees to access wages they have already earned before the scheduled payday, allowing them to manage cash flow more flexibly when needed. Unlike conventional lending or borrowing products, Canopy is not a loan. It provides access to already earned income, helping employees respond to unexpected expenses without relying on high-interest credit or short-term borrowing.

One of Canopy’s key strengths is that it does not require direct integration with a company’s payroll system in order to be implemented. This significantly lowers the operational burden on employers and makes adoption faster and more practical across a wide range of workplace environments. Because the service can be introduced without major changes to existing payroll processes or infrastructure, employers can offer a meaningful financial wellness benefit with greater ease and flexibility.

For employees, Canopy helps reduce financial stress by providing timely access to earned income before payday, contributing to greater peace of mind and improved day-to-day financial stability. For employers, it can strengthen benefits competitiveness, support employee satisfaction, and contribute to better retention and engagement.

In addition, Canopy is designed with flexible operating and settlement structures that can be adapted to different industries, workforce types, and employer needs. This enables companies to introduce the service in a way that aligns with their existing operations while maintaining transparency and administrative efficiency.

In short, Canopy is a B2B financial wellness solution that gives employees greater financial flexibility and gives employers an easier, lower-friction way to offer a differentiated and meaningful benefit.

B·Pay is a global payment infrastructure platform designed to connect various payment methods and financial systems through a single API. Traditional payment environments are fragmented due to differences in payment methods, financial regulations, and authentication processes across countries. B·Pay addresses these challenges by providing a unified payment orchestration layer that enables integration with multiple payment networks, e-wallets, and card payment systems.

The platform also connects identity verification with payment processes, allowing organizations to manage authentication and financial transactions within a single workflow. Delivered as an API-based infrastructure, B·Pay enables financial institutions, fintech platforms, mobility services, and online platforms to quickly deploy secure payment services and scale globally.

products.name: IDBlock (Blockchain-based Identity Verification Infrastructure)
products.detail:
IDBlock is a blockchain-based identity verification infrastructure designed to enable secure and privacy-preserving authentication without centralized storage of personal data. The platform utilizes Self-Sovereign Identity (SSI) and Zero-Knowledge Proof (ZKP) technologies to allow users to verify their identity while minimizing exposure of sensitive information.

Unlike conventional identity systems that rely on centralized databases and are vulnerable to data breaches, IDBlock adopts a decentralized verification architecture that enhances security and user control over personal data.

The solution is delivered as an API-based infrastructure, allowing seamless integration with financial services, digital wallets, mobility platforms, universities, and online services. It also supports identity verification processes aligned with global KYC and AML compliance requirements.

products.detail:
V·Pay is an AI-based voice authentication and payment interface designed to enable secure user verification and transactions through voice interactions. Unlike conventional payment systems that rely on smartphones or physical input devices, V·Pay introduces a natural voice-driven interface that enables more intuitive user experiences.

In addition to authentication and payments, V·Pay includes a voice interaction advertising platform that delivers contextual brand messages and advertisements based on user voice interactions. This allows service providers to generate new revenue streams by integrating advertising within voice-based user experiences.

The system enhances security by analyzing voice characteristics and behavioral patterns during authentication and can integrate additional verification methods such as facial liveness detection when required. V·Pay can be deployed across various digital environments including connected vehicles, smart devices, mobility services, and wearable devices such as smart glasses.

products.name: 1. TwinWorld (XR-based Spatial Experience Platform)
products.detail:
TwinWorld is an XR-based spatial experience platform that transforms physical spaces into immersive digital environments. It enables users to experience interactive content where the real and virtual worlds seamlessly converge through HMDs and other devices.
By integrating AI-driven 2D-to-3D conversion and volumetric capture technologies, TwinWorld reconstructs real people and environments into digital space, delivering highly realistic and interactive experiences. The platform is applicable across multiple industries including education, healthcare, and entertainment.
Its compact deployment capability (within approximately 10㎡ spaces) allows for easy installation and scalability, making it a highly versatile and commercially viable solution.

By reconstructing spatial structure, depth, and textures with high accuracy, ATLAS enables the rapid creation of realistic environments. Integrated with the TwinWorld platform, it accelerates immersive content production across industries such as education, cultural heritage preservation, digital twins, and metaverse content development.

products.name: KidsDiary (AI-powered Child Emotional & Behavioral Analysis Mental Care Solution)
products.detail:
KidsDiary
AI-Powered Social-Emotional Growth & Development Platform for Young Children (Ages 3–7)
Helping Every Child Understand and Express Their Feelings

1. Overview
KidsDiary is an AI-powered interactive platform designed to support the social-emotional growth and developmental
progress of children aged 3 to 7.

Through friendly AI characters, daily conversations, drawing activities, and story-based engagement,
children naturally express their thoughts and feelings while building essential life skills such as:
- Emotional awareness
- Self-expression
- Empathy
- Language development
- Social interaction
- Confidence

KidsDiary transforms everyday emotional experiences into structured growth insights.


2. Why Social-Emotional Development Matters
Ages 3–7 are the foundation years for:
- Emotional regulation
- Social relationships
- Communication skills
- Self-esteem
- Learning readiness

However, children at this age often:
- Struggle to explain their feelings
- Lack vocabulary to describe emotions
- Show rapid mood changes
- Need guidance in understanding others

KidsDiary provides a safe, engaging environment where children can explore emotions naturally — without pressure or formal testing environments.


3. How KidsDiary Works
1) Personalized AI Character
Each child creates their own AI friend.

This character becomes a trusted companion for daily conversations, making children feel comfortable and open.

2) Three Interactive Diary Experiences
A. Conversation Diary
Children talk about their day in short, friendly dialogues.
AI gently guides them to reflect on feelings and experiences.

B. Drawing Diary
Children draw pictures (house, tree, person, family scenes, etc.) and discuss them with their AI companion.
Encourages creativity and emotional storytelling.


C. Story Diary
After watching short animated stories, children share how they felt about the characters and events.
Builds empathy and perspective-taking skills.
- Each activity supports:
- Emotional literacy
- Vocabulary expansion
- Listening skills
- Creative thinking
- Social awareness


4. Growth Insights for Parents & Educators
KidsDiary translates daily interactions into easy-to-understand growth insights.

Monthly Growth & Development Reports include:
- Emotional expression patterns
- Social engagement indicators
- Communication development
- Creativity and imagination trends
- Attention and focus patterns
- Self-regulation progress


Parents and educators can:
- Understand emotional trends over time
- Identify strengths and emerging needs
- Support children more effectively at home or school

This is not a diagnostic tool —
it is a developmental guidance system.


5. Professional Dashboard (Optional Institutional Version)
For educational institutions and child development centers:
- Integrated emotional trend visualization
- Language and communication development overview
- Engagement tracking
- Individual and group-level insights

This enables structured observation and child-centered support strategies.


6. Key Benefits
✔ Encourages children to express emotions confidently
✔ Builds empathy and social understanding
✔ Supports language and communication development
✔ Provides structured yet playful emotional reflection
✔ Strengthens parent-child communication
✔ Scalable digital solution for schools and centers


7. Ideal Partners
KidsDiary is well suited for:

- Kindergartens
- Early childhood education centers
- International schools
- Child development programs
- EdTech distributors
- Government-supported childcare initiatives



8. Market Positioning
KidsDiary is positioned as:

A Social-Emotional Learning (SEL) and Developmental Growth Platform
Powered by AI, Designed for Early Childhood.

It combines:
- Educational engagement
- Emotional intelligence development
- Data-driven growth tracking
- Child-friendly interactive technology


9. Vision
We believe that:

Children who understand their emotions
grow into confident, empathetic, and resilient adults.
KidsDiary supports that journey — one conversation at a time.

products.name: McKare (Non-contact Radar-based Vital Sign Monitoring System)
products.detail:
McKare Product Overview
JCFTechnology's McKare is a non-contact smart healthcare solution that utilizes radar technology to monitor users' vital signs and activity status in real-time.

Features
Non-Contact Vital Sign Measurement: Accurately detects heart rate, respiratory rate, and movement using radar sensors, without the need to attach any equipment to the body.

Complete Privacy Protection: Adopts a camera-free radar reflection method that makes personal identification impossible. It can be safely installed in privacy-sensitive spaces such as bedrooms and bathrooms.

AI-Based Lifestyle Pattern Analysis: Going beyond simple emergency detection, it leverages an AI platform to analyze the user's daily behavioral patterns and preemptively identify abnormal signs (e.g., early signs of illness, risk of unattended death).

Real-Time Monitoring & Alarms: In the event of an emergency, such as cardiac arrest or a fall, it sends immediate notifications to guardians and administrators via a web dashboard and mobile app.

Strengths
Continuous Monitoring: Eliminates the major drawbacks of traditional wearable devices like smartwatches, such as frequent battery charging and the hassle of removing them before sleep. Simply installing the device in a room enables seamless 24/7 monitoring, 365 days a year.

High User Convenience: Users do not need to operate the device or learn how to wear it, which minimizes resistance to the technology. It also fundamentally eliminates the risk of device loss or damage by the elderly or patients with cognitive decline.

Maximized Operational Efficiency: Through an integrated management platform, a single administrator can remotely monitor multiple individuals simultaneously. This helps compensate for staffing shortages and reduces the workload in welfare institutions, nursing homes, and hospitals.

Proven Safety: It uses radio waves that are harmless to the human body. Its high accuracy and practical effectiveness have already been verified through its deployment in numerous local government single-person household support programs and nursing facilities across South Korea.

products.name: CerviCARE AI (AI-powered Cervical Screening System)
products.detail:
CerviCARE® AI is an AI-powered cervical screening system that integrates a medical imaging device with AI-powered analysis software into a single medical device platform. The system delivers AI analysis results directly on the device within five seconds after image acquisition, demonstrating high sensitivity of 98% and enabling rapid and accurate primary cervical cancer screening. In addition, CerviCARE® AI includes a function that allows cases to be referred to gynecologic oncologists for expert reading, providing an advanced screening environment that combines AI analysis with secondary expert reading.

CerviCARE® AI is designed to capture high-quality cervical images non-invasively and features an intuitive Android-based user interface. Its AI-guided image acquisition function helps maintain consistent examination quality across clinical settings with varying levels of operator expertise, thereby enhancing the operational stability of screening programs.

The AI software analyzes captured cervical images using inference algorithms to identify morphological lesion features and presents four-level classification results to support immediate clinical decision-making, including the need for confirmatory biopsy. This enables healthcare providers to promptly categorize patients as normal, requiring follow-up, requiring treatment, or referral to higher-level medical institutions. As a result, CerviCARE® AI reduces unnecessary additional examinations and medical costs while significantly improving the efficiency of large-scale population-based cervical cancer screening. Beyond device supply, CerviCARE® AI supports a sustainable and scalable global export business model through AI subscription-based services and expert reading–linked offerings.

products.name: BaroPAM
products.detail:
The BaroPAM solution is a zero trust security model and is based on the Pluggable Authentication Module (PAM) method that anyone can easily apply to various operating systems and applications that require 2nd authentication (additional authentication) to strengthen the security of information assets. It is a solution that supports multi-layer authentication system optimized for security.

The BaroPAM solution is a modular authentication method that does not require a separate authentication server and supports multi-layer authentication system in a decentralized manner, breaking away from centralization. It provides strong security, is simple, requires no management, and has no significant issues. Anyone can easily apply and use it right away. It is a low-cost, highly efficient solution that does not require the introduction of additional servers or DBs when introducing the solution.

▶Supports multi-layer authentication using a multi-layer authentication system that does not require a separate authentication server
▶Guaranteed service with fast authentication speed (average authentication time within 0.01 seconds)
▶Using the globally accepted 512-bit standard Hash function (HMac-SHA512 / Internet security standard IETF RFC 6238)
▶Provides the ability to link environment setting information with a database (MariaDB) in addition to files.
▶Authentication is possible even in frequently occurring communication failures or secure areas
▶Dynamic security support such as one-time/volatile that changes every time or is used once and then discarded
▶You can start with a simple (loose) configuration and evolve to a more complex (strong) security system
▶iOS provides a function that allows you to authenticate yourself
▶It can be used in all fields requiring 2nd authentication, such as information assets ( Among RADIUS authentication of information assets, PAM/SQL/HTTP authentication is also supported )
▶Provides ACL function for accounts that can be allowed/denied from 2nd authentication 
▶BaroPAM provides app source obfuscation and screen capture prevention functions
▶Biometric authentication (fingerprint recognition, face recognition) function is provided when running the BaroPAM app
▶Provides a function to set the number of times and time limit for authentication (eg, 3 times in 30 seconds)
▶Provides the ability to prevent man-in-the-middle attacks
▶Provides the ability to detect and block abnormal connections
▶Even if authentication information is forged or altered during the authentication process, bypass authentication is not possible
▶Authentication bypass (bypass technology, fatigue attack, etc.) is not possible
▶Even if your account information is stolen by abusing the automatic login function, you will not be able to log in 
▶Emergency one-time authentication key provided when smartphone is not available.
▶Provides free customization and interworking development with various applications (API interworking of Java, C, C++, etc.)

The engine integrates realistically collectible data, including health checkups, body composition, lifestyle, symptoms, and medication usage, to generate personalized nutrition strategies based on an individual’s physiological condition and disease context.

Unlike conventional nutrition services that provide generic or surface-level personalization, NUSEUM delivers an execution-oriented system built on structured, evidence-based knowledge and embedded safety mechanisms. Its knowledge layer is grounded in clinical guidelines and peer-reviewed research, enabling transparent and reliable decision-making.

The system includes built-in safety features such as contraindicated food filtering, drug–nutrient interaction management, vulnerable population protection, and explicit “Do Not Recommend” logic. In high-risk cases, it supports escalation to healthcare professionals, ensuring responsible use of AI in health-related decision-making.

NUSEUM goes beyond recommendations by connecting insights to real-world execution. It enables personalized meal planning, food selection, and daily dietary actions, while continuously improving recommendation quality through outcome tracking and feedback loops.

The engine is designed for seamless integration into partner platforms via API and SDK, and can be deployed as a white-label solution across digital health platforms, food commerce and delivery services, health checkup centers, and insurance wellness programs.

NUSEUM defines precision nutrition not as a recommendation tool, but as a clinically grounded, measurable intervention system. By combining evidence, safety, and scalability, it enables food to function as a continuous and effective health management solution.

products.detail:
OptHancer is an on-device AI optimization solution designed to efficiently deploy and execute AI models across a wide range of hardware environments, including mobile devices, PCs, and embedded systems. The solution provides an integrated pipeline for model conversion, precision optimization (quantization), operator-level optimization, and hardware-specific kernel mapping, enabling high-performance AI inference under resource-constrained environments.

Built upon the vision of “Any Model, Any Device,” OptHancer supports automatic conversion and optimization of models developed in various frameworks such as PyTorch and TensorFlow, adapting them to target hardware architectures including NPUs, GPUs, and CPUs. It incorporates advanced optimization techniques such as KV-cache optimization, memory layout optimization, and operator fusion to minimize latency and maximize throughput.

By reducing dependency on cloud infrastructure, OptHancer enables real-time AI processing with enhanced privacy and reliability. It is applicable across multiple domains including smartphones, automotive systems, robotics, and industrial devices, allowing enterprises to deliver fast, secure, and cost-efficient AI services directly on-device.

products.name: MACS(Multi-modal AI for Camera Solution)
products.detail:
MACS: Context-Aware Intelligent Video Analytics

MACS is an advanced, multi-modal AI-driven CCTV analysis system that goes beyond simple object detection to understand situational context and detect complex anomalies in real-time.

The core strength of MACS lies in its "human-like" contextual understanding. While traditional AI focuses on identifying objects, MACS interprets the meaning behind actions—such as "a person collapsing" or "a motorcycle operating without a helmet." This is achieved through sophisticated Vision-Language Model (VLM) technology, which analyzes video and text data simultaneously.

Unlike conventional detection systems, MACS utilizes VLM to enable complex situational awareness even with minimal training data. Furthermore, our lightweight architecture allows for more CCTV channels per GPU, offering superior scalability and cost-efficiency.

MACS features real-time threat detection and instant alerts, enabling immediate response to emergencies. Our technology is certified by major Korean authorities (KISA, KTL), boasting an F1-score of over 96 and a detection accuracy of 90%+ in complex environments.

From falls and fires to trespassing and crowd density, MACS provides flexible detection types tailored to your needs. It is the ideal solution for urban surveillance, industrial sites, ports, airports, and luxury resorts.

Equipped with human-detection safety systems, the robot automatically stops when workers are detected, ensuring operational safety. Its precision motion control delivers uniform and controlled UV-C exposure only where needed, minimizing the risk of crop damage from overexposure. By reducing dependency on chemical pesticides and enabling consistent, repeatable treatment, FARMILY-X UV provides a sustainable and intelligent automation solution for modern greenhouse farming.

products.name: Smilereader (Total service platform for preparing pregnancy)
products.detail:
SmileLab's ovulation and pregnancy test kits are seamlessly integrated with our dedicated mobile app, SmileReader. Available on both the App Store (iOS) and Google Play (Android), the app assists users in managing their fertile windows and planning their pregnancies with precision. While SmileReader is not a medical device and does not provide clinical diagnoses, it serves as a sophisticated tool for interpreting test results.

Interpreting test results with the naked eye can often lead to errors due to the varying intensity of the lines. However, by capturing a photo of the test strip through the app, users receive a clear and objective interpretation. The app analyzes results that are difficult to distinguish manually and displays them as numerical values. This allows users to understand their status at a glance. Beyond test results, the app serves as a comprehensive data hub where users can log notes, basal body temperature, physical symptoms, and menstrual cycles. Based on this data, the app provides personalized features such as test reminders, ovulation date guidance, and LH peak alerts to identify high-fertility days.

Through these services, consumers can easily identify their fertile window, providing invaluable support in pregnancy planning. Notably, the app allows users to share fertility information with their partners, encouraging them to take an active and informed role in the journey toward conception.

To enhance accessibility, our app is offered free of charge with the purchase of our test kits. While many brands now offer dedicated apps, they often require paid subscriptions. In contrast, our complimentary app service ensures that consumers can prepare for pregnancy more conveniently and without financial barriers.

Our ovulation tests are provided in an economical strip format, as they require regular use. Our pregnancy tests are available in three different sensitivity levels—10mIU, 15mIU, and 25mIU—and come in two formats: the economical strip type and the midstream type, which offers the convenience of testing without a collection cup. This variety allows consumers to select the ideal product based on their personal preference and desired testing timeline.

products.name: LIGHTSAVER(Security LED Light)
products.detail:
LightSaver is a next-generation security lighting system that appears as normal lighting to the naked eye but visually distorts images captured by any camera, proactively preventing corporate data leaks and illegal filming.
1. Visual Distortion & OCR Neutralization: Utilizing a unique distortion algorithm, it creates stripe patterns on camera lenses to obscure visual information. It severely drops the Optical Character Recognition (OCR) success rate below 80% (down to 9.7%) and maximizes image degradation, rendering photographed confidential documents unreadable.
2. Proactive Defense with Zero Blind Spots: Unlike passive systems that detect heat signatures after a recording has occurred, LightSaver induces direct optical interference on camera sensors, completely neutralizing filming attempts instantly with no blind spots wherever the light reaches.
3. Overcoming Traditional Security Limits: It effectively blocks visual data leaks from smartphones and micro spy cams that evade metal detectors, eliminating the need for invasive security apps (MDM) or inconvenient physical camera stickers.
4. Versatile Custom Deployment: Available in compact models for small private spaces (e.g., restrooms, fitting rooms) and customizable, large-scale setups optimized for high-security meeting rooms, R&D centers, and smart factories.

1. Real-Time Visual Hacking Prevention via AI: Powered by On-Device AI, it instantly detects smartphone photography, shoulder surfing, and user absence within 25ms, immediately locking the screen in just 0.1ms to block threats proactively.
2. Dual Evidence Collection: When suspicious activity occurs, it captures both the user's webcam feed and a monitor screenshot simultaneously, securing clear dual evidence. The images are kept private by default for personal data protection and are accessible only through strict audit procedures.
3. Essential DLP Functions Built-in: Goes beyond visual security by fundamentally blocking unauthorized extraction through external storage media (USBs), logging printer outputs, and preventing device formatting or the use of prohibited programs.
4. Seamless Deployment & Cost Efficiency: Starts working instantly with a simple agent installation without requiring complex server setups. It offers highly accurate detection (95%) and minimizes false positives at a competitive price compared to traditional solutions.

products.name: SecuDongle - Mobile Network Edition / Standard Edition
products.detail:
🔷 MAIN PRODUCTS 
SecuDongle PNS & BNAB (Hardware-Based Physical Network Segregation Platform)
SecuDongle enables a single PC to operate across different security-classified networks while maintaining strict physical separation through PNS (Physical Network Segregation).
With BNAB (Block Network After Browsing), the network remains disconnected by default and is automatically activated only when a user initiates an application requiring connectivity; once the requested web session is displayed on the user’s screen, the connection is physically blocked again.
By combining PNS and BNAB, SecuDongle not only isolates networks with different security levels, but also minimizes exposure within each isolated domain. This dual-layer architecture reduces persistent connectivity and significantly limits the attack surface across all segregated environments — without requiring multiple terminals or complex network infrastructure.

🔷 PRODUCT BRIEFS 
SecuDongle – Mobile Network Edition
A compact BNAB-based security device tailored for mobile and personal secure computing.
Enables hardware-level network isolation without requiring additional infrastructure.
Well-suited for remote professionals and controlled on-demand internet access.
Includes optional control over wireless interfaces such as WiFi and Bluetooth to reduce unintended connectivity paths

SecuDongle – Standard Edition
A robust hardware-enforced solution engineered for enterprise environments requiring strict network domain separation.
Supports multi-device and multi-VM mapping within a single PC architecture to meet higher assurance demands.
Designed for secure endpoint environments that must operate across distinct security domains without cross-network exposure.

🔷 DIFFERENTIATION 
Unlike conventional software-based isolation, SecuDongle enforces event-driven, hardware-level physical network segregation.
• Enforces default network disconnection at the device level
• Activates connections only when explicitly required
• Automatically revokes network access after task completion
• Prevents unintended cross-network exposure
• Supports multi-device and multi-VM mapping on a single PC
• Enables operation across networks with different security classifications
• Eliminates always-on connectivity risks
• Provides deterministic and auditable enforcement
• Delivers hardware-based assurance beyond firewall or VM-only approaches

products.name: PEAKRO
products.detail:
PEAKRO' is the world's first seller and buyer interactive Agentic AI-based sales performance maximization solution. Moving beyond traditional SaaS methods that merely assist with analysis, it is an execution-oriented sales agent where AI autonomously performs everything from potential customer discovery to initial contact, directly generating the practical outcomes of 'meetings and revenue'.
The main features and strengths of this product are as follows:

[Key Features]
 - Intelligent Data Pipeline Construction: Secures real-time corporate trend data through Multi-Agent cross-validation, and generates and learns high-quality synthetic data by discovering unreleased negotiation edge cases using proprietary LLM fine-tuning (CoT-SFT, SPIN, etc.).
 - A2A-Based Hyper-Personalized Lead Recommendation: Structures data into a real-time Enterprise Knowledge Graph and tracks multi-hop networks to infer potential competitors and explore intelligent contact points. It captures purchase signals using Event-Driven Intent recognition, and coordinates in advance between seller and buyer agents (A2A) to provide hyper-personalized matching with a valid lead ratio of over 70%.
 - Agentic AI Orchestration & Autonomous Collaboration: Automates complex tasks by connecting multi-agents specialized in areas like sales proposals and reports through a sales-specific RAG-MCP architecture. It maximizes conversation context efficiency through Inter-Agent Knowledge Distillation techniques.

[Product Strengths]
 - Execution-Oriented Practical Outcomes (Overcoming limits of existing solutions): Resolves the clear limitation of traditional CRM or DB tools that only added the administrative burden of 'data entry' to sales representatives without leading to real outcomes. Acting as a true 'Agentic AI' that autonomously completes tasks, it boosts the B2B lead conversion rate to over 12%.
 - Hallucination Control Under 1% & High Reliability: Applies a hybrid pipeline combining Verifiable Reward-based reinforcement learning (RLVR) and GRPO techniques. Through this, it strongly suppresses hallucinations during business fact extraction to under 1% and maintains data precision at over 90%.
 - Strict Corporate Data Security & Cost Reduction: Blocks the leakage of sensitive corporate information at the source by establishing independent, isolated Data Vaults for each client and applying Tenant-Level encryption. Also, the RAG-MCP integration method reduces token parsing overhead costs by up to 50%.
 - High Accessibility & Economic Feasibility: Significantly lowers the initial barrier to entry with a highly competitive pricing of 500,000 KRW compared to competitors, and plans to maximize cost efficiency by introducing a performance-based Pay-As-You-Go (PayGo) billing model in the future.

products.name: AEROX e-KYC(One-Step Contactless Fingerprint&Face Verification)
products.detail:
1. Product Features
- AI-powered, contactless multimodal biometric platform (AEROX) for simultaneous fingerprint + face verification.

- Supports multimodal capture using front and rear smartphone cameras.

- Includes single-finger, multi-finger and palmprint recognition technologies.

- Delivered as all-in-one SDK, ensuring stable operation even on entry-level smartphones (Android and iOS).


2. Core Proprietary Technologies
- C2CL (Contact-to-Contactless) technology: Enables full compatibility with legacy fingerprint databases of government and financial institutions.

- AI-based Presentation Attack Detection (PAD): iBeta Level 1 certified technology that effectively protects against spoofing attacks, including photos, videos, and silicone artifacts.

- Vector-based ultra-fast matching engine: Supports both 1:1 verification and 1:N identification across large-scale databases.


3. Differentiation
- Software-based authentication: Utilizing standard smartphone cameras eliminates dependency on dedicated hardware sensors, ensuring broad scalability and cross-device compatibility.

- Reduced infrastructure and migration costs: C2CL technology ensures compatibility with existing legacy biometric systems and touch-based fingerprint databases.

- Fully in-house developed technologies: Independent architecture that ensures flexible deployment, customization, and strong security control.

- Multimodal authentication: Minimized false acceptance rate (FAR) and improved false rejection rate (FRR) ensure top-tier accuracy for enhanced reliability.

- Passive Liveness Detection: Real-time liveness detection without specific user actions, achieving high security with seamless user experience.

- Certified and Standardized: Domestically and globally certified solution, including ISO 27001 / 27017 / 27018 / 27701 / 9001, iBeta PAD testing and 5 registered patents.


4. Use Cases
- Public Safety & Law Enforcement: Allows officers to capture a suspect’s fingerprint with a smartphone and perform real-time 1:N identification against a large-scale national police database.

- Financial eKYC & Remote Identity Verification: Strengthens security beyond ID photo checks for high-value transactions such as insurance enrollment or loan processing by performing real-time fingerprint and facial authentication on the user’s smartphone, reducing the risk of identity theft.

- Smart Mobility & Car Sharing: Verifies a driver’s fingerprint using a smartphone camera before granting vehicle access, preventing unauthorized use and identity fraud.

- Telemedicine & Healthcare: Confirms patient identity via fingerprint authentication during remote consultations, preventing doctor shopping and prescription fraud.


5. References
- Financial Institutions: Samsung Fire & Marine Insurance, Hyundai Marine & Fire Insurance, and 8 other insurers

- Public Institutions: Ministry of Foreign Affairs, National Police Agency, Korea Financial Telecommunications & Clearings Institute

- Global Partner: Regula Forensics, T4TRUST

Granted US Patent US10
